title: Success
author: Priya
content:
<script>
const product = localStorage.getItem('pdf_product');

switch(product){
  case 'java':
    window.location.href='/p/java-pdf-download.html';
    break;

  case 'spring':
    window.location.href='/p/spring-pdf-download.html';
    break;

case 'php':
    window.location.href='/p/php-pdf-download.html';
    break;

case 'unix':
    window.location.href='/p/unix-pdf-download.html';
    break;

case 'android':
    window.location.href='/p/android-pdf-download.html';
    break;
 case 'jira':
    window.location.href='/p/jira-pdf-download.html';
    break;   
   case 'git':
    window.location.href='/p/git-pdf-download.html';
    break;

  case 'json':
    window.location.href='/p/json-pdf-download.html';
    break;

case 'docker':
    window.location.href='/p/docker-pdf-download.html';
    break;

case 'app':
    window.location.href='/p/web-security.html';
    break;

case 'jenkins':
    window.location.href='/p/jenkins-pdf-download.html';
    break;
  
}
</script>
